sglang.title: Minor bugfix on benchmark serving
sglang.author: ywang96
sglang.bodyExcerpt: This PR fixes a minor bug in the benchmark serving where it incorrectly records TTFT as part of ITLs for a request. This issue was originally raised here but I figured to fix it here as well :)

vllm.title: [Core] Streamline stream termination in `AsyncLLMEngine`
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Follow-on from #7111, avoid unnecessarily enqueuing of a final message after an exception and avoid aborting requests in the engine that were never started.

vllm.title: [Model][Jamba] Mamba cache single buffer
vllm.author: mzusman
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
By carefully allocating the Mamba cache at the first "n" slots in the mamba cache before FWD pass ,
We can now remove the redundant CG Mamba buffer.
This PR saves memory, simplifies the Jamba inner state management code and accelerates latency (by removing redundant data copies).
This PR is also app

vllm.title: [Performance] e2e overheads reduction: Small followup diff
vllm.author: alexm-redhat
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR is a followup for #7162 to address leftover review comments and add some more small improvements.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix reinit procedure in ModelInputForGPUBuilder
vllm.author: alexm-redhat
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This fixes the issues with entrypoints tests that were found by @DarkLight1337

vllm.title: [Frontend] Support embeddings in the run_batch API
vllm.author: pooyadavoodi
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Currently run_batch which is the offline batching API only supports chat completion. This PR adds embedding supports to run_batch. The PR also adds support for empty lines (or lines with only whitespace) in the input file of run_batch.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix ITL recording in serving benchmark
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Previously in async_request_openai_completions, TTFT was incorrectly recorded as an ITL in the serving benchmark. This PR fixes it.
FIXES #7242

vllm.title: [Core] Add span metrics for model_forward, scheduler and sampler time
vllm.author: sfc-gh-mkeralapura
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
We are doing some work on understanding VLLM bottlenecks better. Towards that end having additional metrics/spans on where time is spent is useful.
After this change the span attributes will look something like (bolded are additional from this PR)
Attributes:
-> gen_ai.response.model: Str(/data-fast

vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

vllm.title: [Misc] Add numpy implementation of `compute_slot_mapping`
vllm.author: Yard1
vllm.bodyExcerpt: For prefill, the python implementation of compute_slot_mapping is inefficient as we loop over large lists. This PR adds a numpy implementation of the same operation, letting us leverage numpy vectorized instructions for up to 3x speedup with large lists. If the number of slots is small, we still use

vllm.title: [Core] Fix edge case in chunked prefill + block manager v2
vllm.author: cadedaniel
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Closes #7371
This occurs when the last chunk of a sequence in chunked prefill is scheduled for prefill AND the prompt_len is a multiple of block size.
